meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no testing knowledge (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no testing knowledge. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancers: Antigravity Template for Testing (Advanced Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop shipping broken code. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate testing and deliver production-ready apps fast.
content.answer_block: Testing is the silent killer of freelance profit margins. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you bake automated testing into your architecture, not as an afterthought. Use Claude Code to generate unit and integration suites instantly, turning your lack of testing knowledge into a high-value, defensible delivery advantage.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: the feature works on your local machine, you deploy, and the client reports a critical regression five minutes later. The panic is real, the billable hours are evaporating, and your reputation is on the line. In the high-velocity world of freelance AI development, 'I didn't have time to write tests' is a professional death sentence.

But the tide is turning. The Antigravity project template isn't just a boilerplate; it's a structural insurance policy. By integrating this with Claude Code, you shift from manual 'hope-driven' development to a systematic, automated workflow. This is how the top 1% of AI engineers build robust SaaS products that clients actually trust.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational project structure that mandates testing patterns from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project with strict TypeScript settings, Vitest integration, and a pre-configured CI/CD pipeline for automated testing.

steps.title: Automate Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to read your business logic and generate comprehensive unit test suites.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the src/services/api.ts file and generate a suite of Vitest unit tests covering edge cases, null pointers, and success states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate unit tests for src/services/api.ts using vitest'

steps.title: Implement Integration Testing
steps.description: Verify that your AI agent pipelines communicate correctly with external APIs using mock data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an integration test suite that mocks the OpenAI API responses and validates the data transformation logic in the Antigravity pipeline.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'create integration tests for the AI pipeline using mocks'

steps.title: Configure Pre-Commit Hooks
steps.description: Ensure no code reaches the repository unless it passes the full test suite.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure husky and lint-staged to run the full Antigravity test suite on every git commit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'setup husky pre-commit hook to run npm test'

steps.title: Continuous Regression Monitoring
steps.description: Automate the execution of tests in your CI/CD environment to maintain high uptime.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a GitHub Actions workflow that executes the Antigravity test suite on every pull request to ensure zero regressions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate github-actions pipeline for automatic testing'

pro_tips: Always mock external API calls; never hit live endpoints during unit testing to keep your tests fast and free.
Use 'TDD-lite': ask Claude Code to write the test before the implementation to clarify your interface requirements.
Focus your testing on 'happy paths' first, then use Claude to deliberately break your code to find edge cases.
Keep your test files in the same directory as your source code using the .test.ts suffix for easier discoverability.
Treat your test suite as a living document; if the logic changes, use Claude Code to refactor the tests alongside the code, not after.
content.next_steps: After completing this checklist, integrate your repository with a monitoring tool like Sentry to track runtime errors that slip past your test suite, completing your professional freelance delivery stack.
content.conversion_block: Stop gambling with your client's trust and start shipping with absolute confidence. The Antigravity framework is the competitive advantage you need to scale your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
